creator: insane@oneinsane.net
text:
This is a follow-up of my own submission for this pr. I have tested it and
checked it.. All that is needed is an updated md5.
Upadated MD5:

MD5 (rsync-2.2.1.tar.gz) = 54ff63283fbc65ef386ca3365be6753c

>        Port fials to compile because it can not find rsync-2.2.0. Current

>   Fix>          
>        update to rsync-2.2.1>
